product: Databricks connector for Power Platform is generally available
tagline: The Databricks connector for Microsoft Power Platform is now generally available.
what_it_does: The Databricks connector for Microsoft Power Platform is now generally available. The Databricks connector for Microsoft Power Platform enables you to build low code applications, workflows, and agents using your Databricks data. Build apps in Power Apps, create automated flows in Power Automate, and develop AI agents in Copilot Studio while preserving your Databricks governance controls.
why_it_matters: Build apps in Power Apps, create automated flows in Power Automate, and develop AI agents in Copilot Studio while preserving your Databricks governance controls.

capabilities.title: Set up the Databricks connector
capabilities.desc: Set up the Databricks connector on Microsoft Power Platform by creating a connection.

capabilities.title: Use Databricks data on Power
capabilities.desc: Use Databricks data on Power Platform

capabilities.title: Build Power canvas apps, Power
capabilities.desc: Build Power canvas apps, Power Automate flows, and Copilot Studio agents using your Databricks data and Genie Agents.
